name: lingochunk-mcp
description: LingoChunk plugins for Claude Code: language tutoring grounded in your own listening history

plugins.name: lingochunk
plugins.description: Turn a coding agent into a language tutor grounded in your LingoChunk listening history: FSRS-graded vocabulary, native-audio transcripts and clips, Anki export, and skills that build native in-app lessons and flashcards.
